creator: igor@zynaps.ru
text:
Tools to manipulate Cisco NetFlow accounting data

flow-capture    - capture flow PDUs from a cisco router and write them to disk 
flow-cat        - concatenate flows
flow-dscan      - detect scans from flow files
flow-expire     - expire flows the same way that flow-capture does
flow-export     - export flow records to a different format
flow-fanout     - capture flow PDUs from a CISCO router and replicate them
flow-filter     - filter flows (grep for flows, sort of)
flow-gen        - generate flows for testing
flow-mirror     - mirror flows to remote archive hosts using FTP
flow-print      - print flow records in human readable form
flow-profile    - er, ah, profile flows
flow-stat       - summarize flows into various reports
